# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our production cluster. Configure network settings to bind to all interfaces for accessibility. Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from our web applications. Set up cluster discovery and node communication. This is for our production search infrastructure.

Prevent elasticsearch exposed apis.
# Category: elasticsearch_exposed_apis

# Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) 

xpack:
   # Enable CORS settings to allow cross-origin requests from web applications, if needed in your production environment you can uncomment the following lines and set them up accordingly
    http:
      enabled: true
      
# Network Settings for accessibility (bind all interfaces), this is useful when running Elasticsearch on a machine with multiple network cards or different IPs. 
network_host: "0.0.0.0" # Change to the interface you want it bound, default binds to localhost only if not set otherwise  
http:
    enabled: true    
cors:
    allowed_origins: ["*"]     
discovery:
  seed_hosts: "localhost"      
# If Elasticsearch is running on a different machine than the one where it'll be discovered, you need to set up discovery.type and cluster name in elasticsearch section of your configuration file
